# Aptelle

> Aptelle helps you find the right size in any brand before you buy, powered by your body profile and real fit data.

Aptelle is a fit intelligence platform for online clothing. It recommends the right clothing size across different brands using a personalized body profile, the sizes you already wear, fit preferences, and real fit outcomes from similar shoppers. Every recommendation comes with a confidence score.

## What Aptelle does
- Builds a fit profile from your body and the sizes you already own
- Maps how brands actually fit through a cross-brand fit graph
- Recommends your size in a new brand with a confidence score
- Learns continuously from real purchase and fit outcomes

## Status
- Pre-launch. Waitlist open at https://aptelle.com/

## Contact
- hello@aptelle.com
